<!--
Every field below is REQUIRED. Codex will apply `agios:needs-scope` and skip this
issue if any field is missing or says "TBD".
-->

**Type:** <!-- RESEARCH | MAINTENANCE | IMPROVEMENT | EXPERIMENT -->

**Objective:**
<!-- One sentence describing what this issue accomplishes -->

**Allowed paths:**
```
<!-- List exact file globs Codex may touch, e.g.: -->
<!-- backend/routers/fantasy.py -->
<!-- frontend/src/pages/Roster.jsx -->
```

**Blocked paths:**
```
.github/**
.agios/**
*.env*
```

**Implementation instructions:**
<!-- Step-by-step. Be specific enough that no clarification is needed. -->

1. 
2. 
3. 

**Acceptance criteria:**
<!-- Testable conditions. Each line should be verifiable. -->

- [ ] 
- [ ] 

**Verification command:**
```bash
# Exact command to run after implementation
```

**Rollback plan:**
<!-- What to do if this change breaks something -->

**Risk level:** <!-- LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH -->

**Auto-merge allowed:** <!-- yes | no -->

**Success metric:** <!-- Required for IMPROVEMENT and EXPERIMENT; omit for RESEARCH and MAINTENANCE -->
